reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Staff isn't good
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Khoa, 

Firstly, thank you very much for your staying with us and spending time on rating our hotel. 

We are always try the best to bring the best service to our guest and your satisfaction is really such a big motivation with us. So, we are also so sorry that your experience about our staff was not good and would like to listen you more for better service.

Once again, thank you very much and we are always looking forward to welcoming you. Wish you a good trip and see you again ! 

Sincerely,

reviews.title: Dirty, everywhere

reviews.positives: Location was premium. Staff and housekeeping were exceptional, food was excellent.
reviews.negatives: The wait staff in the bar are deplorable. If you want a drink, you must go up to the bar and request it. There is no service, ever.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I go to check in but the receptionist take out 1 breadkfast coupon. So thet I must tell that I stay 2 person. Then the reception return to me 2 coupon.  (Infact when I am booking 1 room with 2 breakfast. even I stay 1 or 2 person. the reception must give me 2 breakfast coupon).  Inside room have coffee + lipton tea.  (But hotel give me 2 coffer + 1 lipton tea only.  It should be 2 lipton tea. nevertheless. the lipton tea bag open already)

reviews.title: Clean., Friendly, ✅✅
reviews.positives: Very nice 🥰
reviews.negatives: Good 👍

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Yeah…imagine walking into the lobby after a long trip and you hear a loud pop, then all the lights go off. Breakfast was meh, I guess it was because of the new year. But yeah, thats how bad it was .

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent experience at Cửu Long Hotel. First, the value for money: you are greeted and attended to by a friendly and helpful staff, your rooms are clean and equipped with the required amenities, and breakfast is good with plenty of choices, all for a very affordable price. Then, the location in the city's center has a nice view of the Mekong River. Thanks to all the staff.

reviews.title: Bad receptionists
reviews.text: We are 3 adults who stayed at this hotel for more than 5 days and they gave us 2 keys only. When we asked for another key for the remaining adult, one of the receptionists told us straight in the face that their policy is for 2 keys only and if we have to go out, we should give them the key so other adult can come and get it. Don’t give out the key because they will loose it and they will lie to you. They also alleged that we destroyed 1 of the decoration fabric even though we did not let them inside the room. I still don’t know which room that destroyed the fabric but they blamed you anyway. Don’t even try to book the hotel directly because they will charge your for 30% more than other booking apps charged you.  No wonder the hotel keeps loosing money to all the trabel apps.

reviews.title: My reliable place to stay in My Tho
reviews.positives: Solid all around. I can see why it’s so well rated.
reviews.negatives: No complaints.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: We were travelling with a young child and upon checking in, I requested for 2 room cards, but was denied on the ground that each room is issued with 1 card. I requested for an extra card because I planned to go for early morning exercises or afternoon walk while my family sleeps or naps in the room. The staff did not enquire about my request but simply deny me outright. The breakfast served does not have many chocies and leaves much to be desired for international travellers. The bed mattress  was way to hard and my back was sore from a night's sleep (Did not sleep well at all).

reviews.negatives: The location

The next swallow factory is noisy, and it is woken up early in the morning.

Everything else is fine.
The shower was hot and comfortable.

Anyway, Swallow factory is noisy!!

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.title: Emplacement unique! Dommage pour l'inconfort des lits
reviews.positives:
Le lieu est exceptionnel, face au Mékong — à condition d’avoir une chambre avec balcon et vue. Sinon, cela perd beaucoup de son intérêt et il vaut peut-être mieux passer votre chemin.
Le petit-déjeuner buffet est plutôt réussi : assez varié et de bonne qualité.
Les prix restent raisonnables. L’hôtel est classé 3 étoiles, mais il a par moments des airs de 4 étoiles.
reviews.negatives:
Comme chaque fois que nous venons, nous oublions à quel point les matelas sont durs comme du bois. Résultat : les trois quarts du groupe ne dorment pas bien.
Les costumes du personnel chargé des bagages devraient aussi être changés : à chaque fois, on a l’impression wit les clients vont se faire arrêter par la police.
Quant au personnel à l’accueil… il n’est vraiment pas accueillant. Pourtant, c’est leur travail : sourire, parler avec les clients, poser des questions sympathiques, faire des recommandations de restaurants ou de visites. Ici, impossible d’obtenir un sourire ou un échange.
Lorsque je demande à changer de chambre, on me répond d’abord qu’il n’y en a plus, alors qu’il en reste. Finalement, on accepte d’en changer une (je paie même la différence de prix), mais je ne comprends pas pourquoi il faut insister autant pour quelque chose d’aussi simple. Est-ce par paresse ?
Si les matelas étaient au moins recouverts d’un surmatelas, cela changerait déjà beaucoup de choses.
Sinon, les produits de toilette sont hyper basiques, les serviettes sont usées, devenues grises ou tachées avec le temps. La décoration est aussi un peu vieillotte. L’insonorisation n’est pas très bonne non plus : on entend la rue et les voisins.
C’est vraiment dommage, car j’ai envie d’y retourner. Mais, de grâce : changez ces matelas beaucoup trop durs ! 😅

reviews.title: X̌xxx
reviews.positives: L'emplacement
reviews.negatives: Les matelas trop ferme

reviews.title: Next To River
reviews.text: Simple room decor. A sleepy area.

reviews.title: Bel emplacement pour un hôtel très sympa
reviews.positives: Bel emplacement, bel hôtel et bons petits déjeuners.
reviews.negatives: L’hôtel n’a pas averti de la présence du mega événement sur le marathon. Aussi nuits horribles, bruit incroyable dès 5 h du matin et ce toute la journée non stop. Ultra bruyant alors que le repos était primordial

reviews.title: Pricy and terrible bed
reviews.text: For a cheaper price you can enjoy softer bed and pillow at mekong hotel my tho

reviews.title: Bien situé, extrêmement bruyant, propre avec un petit déjeuner varié
reviews.positives: La situation géographique est intéressante, le petit déjeuner assez varié (surtout pour un asiatique), la propreté des lieux.
reviews.negatives: L’hôtel aurait dû prévenir les clients qu’il y aurait un marathon débutant à 5h du matin avec une animation et un bruit assourdissant SANS ARRÊT jusqu’à 2 h du matin pendant deux jours et demi, soit la durée de notre séjour. Suivi par la dernière nuit de milliers de motocyclistes klaxonnant non stop pendant des heures. Ce n’est pas la faute de l’hôtel mais la très mauvaise insonorisation (en fait c’est comme si on dormait sur le trottoir) et les lits ultra durs nous ont apporté un séjour mémorable dans le mauvais sens. Et le restaurant du soir ? Tellement mauvais ! Vraiment ! On reviendra sûrement car il y a des aspects positifs mais s’il pouvait offrir le jus frais en supplément ce serait fort apprécié. Ah j’oubliais, certaines chambres sont sans fenêtre. Pour plus de 25 dollars la nuit pour une personne. On a payé cela comme supplément de 5e personne. Parce qu’on est une famille de 5 avec 3 enfants en bas âge. Comme d’habitude à plus de 5 on est pénalisé. Quelle honte!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room is very dark due to insufficient lighting, especially in the bathroom. It was very difficult to shave because it was too dark. The room is also quite small. However, the staff across all departments are excellent.

reviews.title: Un 3 étoiles pour de vrai.
reviews.positives: Jolie quartier pour agréable ballade nocturne. Très bon restaurants. La marina est a 5mn  pour un tour des iles du Mékong. Le petit déjeuner est riche. Un vrai 3 étoiles qui tient ses promesses.
reviews.negatives: A la lecture du tarif des chambres exposé a l'accueil j'aurais pu bénéficier d'un UP grade très appréciable? Taille de la chambre ou vue sur le fleuve. Je suis genius 2 proche du 3

reviews.title: Ok hote, but dont do their tours
reviews.text:
The hotel has a great location, the staff is very nice, but the facilities are two stars maximum. However considering the price we paid I found this reasonable. Cleanliness is an issue.
One advice would be to not do their day tours. We had a great guide and she made the thing interesting, but the tour itself was nothing but a trip from one "shopping" location to the other where people tried to get us to buy honey, sweets, fruits, tip for songs, tip for horse rides  etc. (usually in very aggressive manner).

reviews.title: superbe

reviews.title: Good location but improvement needed
reviews.text: Room is good, view from the room is lovely, bath room cleanliness is needs to be improved. The towels are smelly, hairs are around the floor. We went to the restaurant for dinner ordered 3 kind of thing two was out of Stock. At 4am other guest started to shout in the hotel, I have no idea why...but this happened in the afternoon as well. This hotel is ok for one night But dont expect a silent night and take your own towel with you.

Airco gaat uit als je de kamer verlaat.  Als je later komt is de kamer weer erg warm. 
Ontbijt buffet wordt niet goed bijgevuld

reviews.text: Clean, new hotel, and though a little soulless, the views of the river are excellent, especially from the upper floors, so very much worth selecting a 'river view' room. The staff didn't speak a lot of English, but were extremely helpful all the same.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel in the center.
reviews.text: The hotel is quite beautiful in the central area right across from the park, so it is quite spacious and has a nice river view. The staff is friendly. You can park along the road in front of the hotel.

reviews.title: Cuu Long Hotel has a new  very Racist policy
reviews.text: I've stayed in this hotel for a really long time. But this time I found out when ordering room service that the kitchen will only serve western food for in room dinning but not Vietnamese cuisine.  This is the only hotel in Vietnam that I know of that have this racist policy that cater to only white people. Luckily, this is not the only hotel in My Tho city. Also there are apps such as Grab and Shopee that I can order Vietnamese food delivered to the hotel instead of eating from a racist kitchen

reviews.title: Rất vui khi quay lại khách sạn nếu những góp ý trên được cải thiện. Chân thành cảm ơn!
reviews.positives: Điểm tâm tạm ổn, nhân viên dễ thương.
reviews.negatives: Vòi nước lavabo chưa hợp lý vì vòi sát bên trong qua làm nước văng ra phía trong vách và tràn xuống sàn. Bàn chải đánh răng quá cứng và kem đánh răng quá tệ, Vòi nước phòng phòng tắm 304 sao bị lắp ngược chiều nóng - lạnh? khi gọi lễ tân cần trợ giúp thì chờ đợi quá lâu làm ảnh hưởng thì giờ cần tắm và nghỉ ngơi của khách.

reviews.title: Issues
reviews.text: The parking lot does not have an elevator, having a lot of luggage can be a bit troublesome, but the security here is very enthusiastic, so it's okay. However, during my one-night stay, I noticed that having the reception staff call guests in the early morning to move their cars is quite bothersome. When you park, they provide a phone number, but calling the room and the personal phone in the early morning to find the car is very annoying.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Gân sông mát mẻ

reviews.title: Great location, helpful staff, but room cleanliness needs improvement
reviews.text:
Cuu Long Hotel is in a fantastic spot right on the riverfront, just a short stroll from the old town. The area is lively, with plenty of bars nearby, though the hotel itself has a restaurant and a rooftop bar with lovely views, so you don’t need to go far for food or drinks.

The room we stayed in was reasonably sized with a view over the rear of the property. On the surface, it looked clean, and bedding was fresh with daily towel changes. However, for a hotel of this standard, the deeper cleanliness was disappointing. The curtain voiles were badly ripped, the door frame was grimy, and there was a lot of dust in the ceiling area, making us wonder if the room had been unused for some time.

On the positive side, the hotel porter and reception staff were extremely helpful and welcoming, which made our stay more pleasant.

Overall: Excellent location and great service, but the rooms could benefit from more thorough maintenance and cleaning.

Phòng decor kiểu cổ điển, không có nét riêng, sạch sẽ. Cách âm chưa tốt.

Nhân viên vui vẻ, lịch sự.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
The bed sheets have a bit of blood on them, an additional charge of 500,000! 

Why not instruct the housekeeping department to soak it in warm water and clean it well? 

This is not a difficult stain to wash out!!!! 

I am very dissatisfied with this stay, even though it's my third time coming home. 

You should choose a different hotel, Cuu Long only has a good view of the river which I like!
reviews.response:
Chị Thu thân mến, 

Lời đầu tiên, rất cảm ơn Chị đã quan tâm lựa chọn Cửu Long và dành thời gian đánh giá khách sạn.

Cửu Long rất tiếc về việc áp dụng phụ thu drap trải giường dính máu khiến Chị không hài lòng, do trường hợp này không đủ điều kiện tái sử dụng nhằm đảm bảo vệ sinh theo tiêu chuẩn của khách sạn. 

Cửu Long rất mong nhận được sự cảm thông từ Chị và hy vọng được tiếp tục đón tiếp, phục vụ Chị.

Trân trọng./.

reviews.title: My family had a wonderful experience.
reviews.text: I honestly advise anyone booking to choose a higher floor (from the 5th floor up), but I can't conveniently share why. The staff is very enthusiastic, from the security, reception, management, to housekeeping... very caring and attentive, hospitable, and they resolve any issues the guests may encounter with a willingness to make improvements. The lunch menu is decent, the food is delicious, seasoned just right without being overly sweet. The breakfast buffet is not too impressive. The hotel is 3 stars but has all the necessary amenities. The toilet is clean. The bed is acceptable, but the mattress and pillows are not very comfortable; I hope the hotel will improve the quality of the mattress and pillows.

Sincerely,

reviews.text: We stayed in a two bedroom family suite which was very nice with a beautiful view of the river. It is so difficult to find good family accommodation in Vietnam and this was a lovely exception.

reviews.title: Delicious breakfast
reviews.text: The meals at the restaurant on the second floor are inexpensive and very delicious. Whatever you do, do not go to the riverside restaurant! The riverside restaurant is expensive and not good at all! The service at this front desk is incredibly kind. This hotel is highly recommended.

reviews.negatives: Location was a bit noisy at night. Construction etc. But that's the case in most cities

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
The hotel is located opposite the Lạc Hồng flower garden, with a view of the Tiền River. The café on the 8th floor offers a beautiful panoramic view of Tân Long islet.

The breakfast buffet has a variety of dishes and is delicious.

The reception staff is friendly, and the employees serving the breakfast buffet are quick.

The rooms are clean, relatively new, but the hotel decor lacks highlights. The bed in the room is a bit firm. The towel rack is too high. Everyone should choose a room with a window for more ventilation.

reviews.title: Comfortable Stay
reviews.positives:
The beds were relatively comfy and good view.
 Breakfast selection not to bad.
Staff were very helpful and was able to get the balcony unlocked quickly.
reviews.negatives:
Construction happening in front of the hotel. 
Stronger air conditioner as we found it to weak.
We would have lived a longer breakfast time.
Booked 2 rooms and 1x rooms balcony lock was faulty.
Our dad got locked out of the balcony due to the faulty lock.
Better cleaning needs to done. Like pull the bedside table out and clean under and behind it as we noted small bugs around.
Hotel could also do with an update and fresh paint.

reviews.title: Clean and no smell
reviews.text: Clean and no smell

reviews.title: Best hotel at Mekong River in My Tho
reviews.text: Nice location, near restaurants, cafe, 5 minutes walk to the market.  Five minutes by Grab (about 10K VND) to the Catholic Cathedral, Vin Town and Vinh Trang Pagoda.  10 minutes by boat or car to Ben Tre city.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location and balcony was excellent. They have a great view ,nice shower room really big.
reviews.negatives: Beds and pillows rock hard, really uncomfortable, dirty walls in room, basic old furniture ripped curtains . Breakfast was not very good coffee so strong undrinkable .

reviews.title: First time in My Tho
reviews.text:
15 minutes walk to either My Tho market or the Tourist wharf. 
Breakfast is good. Doorman is very helpful. I recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Nice location
reviews.positives: Nice location and good breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Beautiful, quaint hotel next to Mekong River.
reviews.text: Nice and clean hotel with good view of the Mekong River and the coconut island.  Reasonable.  We have booked here many times and find it excellent return for your money.  All front desk, kitchen and security staff were always friendly and helpful.  The laundry service at the hotel is the best and cheapest in all of Vietnam..  Will return again.  The facilities do need an upgrade particularly the plumbing and towels area.  Otherwise, it is an unforgettable stay.

reviews.title: Average hotel
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was very average and people were smoking at tables.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great place

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nice Hotel directly at the waterfront. Very quiet. Room with window. diverse local breakfast. Super helpful and very friendly staff! Nice lobby and rooftop bar with a nice view over the delta (but note comment below)
reviews.negatives: Not a problem for us, but for some this information may be important: The hotel front is currently under renovation, which affects rooms with a balcony.

reviews.title: Good location and clean hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel was very clean and very close to the river. If you are staying in the river facing rooms, the river view is great. The breakfast also had lots of options to choose from.
Pros:
Good location, clean and great breakfast

Very close to the boat pier. If you want to do Mekong delta tour and are atleast 3-4 people, negotiating rate with the boat owner directly at the pier is much cheaper than the tour offered by the hotel.

Cons:
The hotel should provide refillable water bottle option. Water is a problem in Vietnam and beacuse of buying bottled water we ended up creating a lot of plastic waste at the end of each day

The restaurant food wasn't great. We ordered spaghetti and club sandwich. Club sandwich was good but Spaghetti was a total let down. The restaurant is not a good value for money. Its better to eat at nearby places

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Their employees are polite and providing good service.
reviews.negatives: I think there are little insects in bed and blanket.

reviews.title: Luxury far from the big city!
reviews.text:
A 3-star hotel acting with a higher rating.
Comfortable bed, pillow and clean.
Slight issue with reception as there is a lack of English especially the supervisor. I booked and paid for 2 adults but was given 1 breakfast voucher, when I asked for the 2nd in the event someone stayed with me, I was asked to pay a fee. to which I advised it should be included having paid for 2 guests (which was more than 1).

Great location by the water with a rooftop bar overlooking Mekong River.

reviews.title: Overall, I'd recommend this hotel to anyone who choose to stay around this area!
reviews.positives:
Breakfast every morning was amazing for convenience and value for money whilst stay at the hotel. 
Location is almost perfect and close by to friends/family we were visiting at the time. 
Staff were very friendly and tried to accommodate to our every needs, especially trying to adhere to my mums requests (which she's elderly and picky!) 

Unfortunately, we had to change rooms two times when were stayed there due to water leaks from bathrooms above our floor (which I'm sure the hotel staff did not anticipate for the bathroom ceiling to cave in. 
I did not find this to be a major issue as I'm pretty easy going and happy they rectified our stay with another room within under 5 mins. 

However, mum found it to be an inconvenience moving to another room, which is also fair from her view.

The very next day there were plenty of workers who were called out to fix up the hotel on all the floors due to the major leak! To which is impressive for a 3 star hotel, as I use to work in a 5 star hotel.. and things would be logged to be fixed with engineers/contractors but we wouldn't see anything done for another 3 months - 12 months+!
SO from my perspective, Cuu Long Hotel are extremely fast and efficient at fixing something as long as you give them a chance before getting annoyed/upset/disappointed :)
reviews.negatives:
From mums and possibly other guests perspective, the bathroom ceiling leak that caved in. It must've caved between the time the cleaner reset the room and the time we arrived and were shown to our room - as the staff were surprised when we notified them. 

Perhaps I'd suggest a very last minute check of rooms that are being booked just to ensure it's all good prior to guests arrival.

reviews.title: Modern hotel in a good location.
reviews.positives: The hotel is in a very good location facing the river  across a wide road. We were able to check in early which we appreciated. We had asked for a river view which we had from our room on the side. Breakfast was good. We took a private tour of four islands. The guide spoke good English and was knowledgeable. We paid the guide direct. Be prepared to tip the boat driver and lady with the rowing boat. We knew the details of the trip before we booked but it is not accurately reflected in the leaflet from reception  - it's three hours long (not all day) and does not go to Ben Tre. A taxi back to HCMC airport cost 1.2 m VND.
reviews.negatives:
We needed a second chair of the balcony. 
There was a private function with loud music on the second floor one evening. Reception said it should finish at 10 pm but it went on later.

reviews.title: A good C/P hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is situated 30 meters from the river and 5' on foot to the My Tho market. Lots of cafes and eateries around. The room is clean with some basic furniture. It shows a bit of age, but is very well-kept. The bed is a little hard. The breakfast is quite good. Staff is super friendly, helpful and efficient. It deserves every one of its three stars.

reviews.title: A comfortable stay in My Tho.  Room was clean and comfortable.  Breakfast good and staff friendly.
reviews.positives:
Good location on the river front.

Walking distance from shops and restaurants.  Short taxi ride to Pagoda.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.  All good.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hai long

reviews.title: Great, clean and good location hotel. We will be back when have chance.
reviews.positives:
The room is big, clean with a great view of Cuu Long river and the big, green park at its front. With the window open, fresh and cool wind flowing in the afternoon and night is enjoyable, air-con is not needed. Sitting at the table in the balcony, we can enjoy coffees at any time.

Service is great and helpful. Good breakfast. It should be 4-start at least.
reviews.negatives: Could not find one!

reviews.title: Best choice in My Tho
reviews.text: Great hotel at the Mekong river. Rooms with balcony and stunning view. Rooms not so big but with all facilities except safety box. Staff very friendly but not master English language. Best choice in town

reviews.title: Excellent hotel
reviews.positives: Fantastic location by the river, our room had a river view which was stunning. The staff were extremely helpful and friendly. The room was clean and spacious and there's a great bar on the top floor.
reviews.negatives: I would like larger pillows

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hai long

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Had to change rooms as our first room smelled of smoke, luckily the hotel had another room available for a small additional charge as it was facing the gardens and had a window as the first room did not. Our group of 5 enjoyed the choices at the breakfast buffet which included Pho! Clean facilities and lovely door man who helped us find a spot for a late night dinner.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Staffs are friendly, good location, facilities are clean. The only negative thing is the bathroom. It’s so small. The bathtub design is terrible.  Water flashed everywhere when I took shower.

reviews.title: Relaxing
reviews.positives: Staff
reviews.negatives: It was all good

reviews.title: Staff education is good.
reviews.text: It is located in front of the Mekong River, and the view is good. The staff is well-trained, and the warm response was evident from the front desk, restaurant, doormen, and parking attendants. The room did not have a window, but it was not a problem for me as I wanted to work on my computer. However, I think a room with a window would feel better for a regular trip. Unfortunately, there were small bugs (ants?) around the desk in the room, and no matter how many I squashed, they wouldn't disappear. I also saw a few of these bugs in the breakfast restaurant. It might be inevitable since it's a tropical country, though.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lovely hotel. Everything good

reviews.text: Everything was perfect. Stayed here before and will return again

reviews.text: The hotel is in excellent. Staff are friendly and helpful. Breakfast was good. No swimming pool. No special price for long stay.

reviews.title: . It is actually big and beautifule th
reviews.positives: Love the location and love the family room with an open window so we can have a stunning view

reviews.title: I highly recommend it.
reviews.text: I spent one night during a bike trip, and the reception staff and parking staff were very kind. I highly recommend it!! The riverside view is very nice. The breakfast was also decent. However, there is a bit of motorcycle noise at night.

reviews.title: Amazing place, go for it
reviews.positives: Amazing place! That's been my favourite hotel in Vietnam and I can't recommend it more : ) It's a great value for money - the location is pretty central, the facilities were great, delicius breakfast and helpful staff members!

reviews.title: Pretty good.
reviews.text:
Good: Everything is very well polished from the room's interior. The breakfast buffet view directly overlooks the park and river, which is very chill.

Limitations: The soundproofing is not good, you can clearly hear conversations in the hallway and when the doors close in the neighboring rooms, it can be startling when sleeping at night. The soundproofing from the second floor to the rooms is not good; you can clearly hear noises in the hallways of the rooms.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Thinking about nutrition
reviews.text: This is my first time using the service, the receptionist and security are very good, the room is beautiful, and the view is nice. However, the toilet should be cleaned thoroughly, the toilet bowl smells a bit, but everything else is okay.

reviews.title: Cuu Long Hotel - My Tho
reviews.text: Very good hotel by the river. Very clean, nice staff and very nice buffet breakfast. Great view of the city from rooftop. I recommend it to anyone staying in My Tho.

reviews.title: Good place to stay
reviews.text: Good place to stay.

reviews.title: Best hotel in town, value, and central
reviews.text: Great river view, opposite from river park, near market, restaurants and cafes.  Roomy and clean, could use more towels and toilet paper.  Good breakfast and friendly service.

reviews.title: Cuu Long Hotel stay
reviews.text: Very nice room. Brilliant views. Nice staff. Great breakfast.

reviews.title: Ổn
reviews.text: Everything is okay except the attitude of security guard in the parking garage, he looks like friendly. My Tho is quiet city to travel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Really enjoyed my stay in Cuu Long Hotel My Tho. Very friendly and helpful staff. Excellent Vietnamese breakfast - enough choice for Westerners too. Close to river and some rooms have river views. Walking distance from Vinh Trang Pagoda. Had a lovely time in My Tho and would return to this hotel anytime. Not a big choice of local restaurants in walking distance around the hotel, but one always has the option to eat dinner in the hotel too.
